channel.title: Nws on Yu Cheng
channel.description: Recent content in Nws on Yu Cheng

item.title: How to read the NWS hurricane warning
item.description: The University will be closed on both Thursday and Friday in preparation for the approaching Hurricane Matthew. Students and faculties were asked to leave RSMAS by 5 pm on Wednesday since wind shutters would completely seal the MSC building. The threat seems imminent; people are freak out – Publix was like a war zone when I was ordered to pick up some bottled water on my way home.
